item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 2min The #Giants’ situation with All-Pro DT Dexter Lawrence is not in a good place and
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 2min The #Giants’ situation with All-Pro DT Dexter Lawrence is not in a good place and has not been for a while.
While money is a big part of it, another element is that Lawrence has seen many players leave the organization over the years. He’s stayed quiet, been a good soldier, and Mostrar más 31 45 171 5 mil
